title: Bounce Ball Clicker
description:
[About the Game]

Bounce Ball Clicker is a stage-based clicker and puzzle game where you place various items on a 7x7 grid, bouncing launched balls to collect a target amount of coins.

[Key Features]

• Strategic Freedom: Buy items with your coins and freely drag and drop them onto the board! Utilize a wide variety of items—such as "Reflectors" to change ball trajectories and "Warp Holes" to teleport them—to construct the most efficient route for earning coins.

• Exhilarating Progression: When a ball passes over a "Multiplier Tile", coin production on all subsequent items is multiplied! By combining Upgrades like "Click Power" and "Diamond Balls", you can experience the thrilling rush of your coin count skyrocketing exponentially.

• Slot Machine Thrills: Place the special "Slot Machine" item to trigger powerful buff events, such as Frenzies or a rapid-fire barrage of Rainbow Balls! Enjoy dynamic gameplay where strategy meets luck.

• Clear Rank System: In "Challenge Mode", your final rank is determined by your Clear Time and placement Efficiency in reaching the target coin goal. Build the optimal board, pray to the Slot Machine, and aim for the ultimate "S-Rank"!
description_short: Bounce Ball Clicker is a stage-based clicker & puzzle game where you place various items on a 7x7 grid and bounce balls to collect a target number of coins. Build the optimal route while considering item synergies, and earn the target amount with maximum speed and efficiency!
